response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack and systems software engineer with 17+ years of experience, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear anywhere in his background. His closest relevant experience is low-latency systems work at Sociomantic and some embedded/C++ work at National Instruments, but these fall far short of the chip architecture and deep-learning workload optimization expertise this principal-level role demands. His recent AI exposure is limited to agentic software tooling at the application layer, not hardware-level AI accelerator characterization.
strengths: Demonstrated high-throughput systems performance work handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency design
Broad multi-language depth including C/C++ with embedded and tooling experience at National Instruments
Long, consistent track record of senior and staff-level engineering with self-directed technical leadership
concerns: Zero experience with SoC or IP modeling, chip architecture, or any hardware-level performance work
No background in deep learning workloads, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD pipelines, or AI accelerator optimization
Principal-level hardware-software co-design is the core of this role; candidate's entire career is application- and service-layer software
